education.institution: Central University of Finance and Economics
Central University of Finance and Economics
courses: Supply Chain Strategic Planning and Design

projects.name: Designing Proactive Healthcare Networks with Mobile Clinics for Co-morbidities
projects.description: First Author. Optimized cooperative mobile clinic routing for rural elderly patients with multiple chronic conditions under demand decay and multi-vehicle synchronization. Designed improved ALNS algorithm outperforming Gurobi in solution quality and computational efficiency. Presented at INFORMS ICSS 2026 (Hangzhou) and IFORS 2026 (Vienna).

projects.name: Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei Agricultural Supply Chain Resilience Coordination
projects.description: Team Leader. Built price prediction models using Random Forest, LSTM, and Graph Neural Networks (GNN); GNN achieved best performance across 1–5 day forecast horizons. Developed evolutionary game theory model (21 variables) and system dynamics simulation; designed three-tier emergency response mechanism with ML-based early warning and distributed micro-warehouses for last-mile supply assurance.

projects.name: JD Warehouse Storage Location Allocation and AGV Path Planning
projects.description: Team Leader. Built multi-objective ABC storage allocation model and AGV dynamic programming model with clustering-based scheduling. Validated via Flexsim simulation on 20,000 SKUs; awarded Second Prize in JD Logistics Cup Smart Supply Chain Competition.

work.summary: Conducted weekly distributor inventory and sales analysis using SQL and Excel; optimized performance monitoring across dual-channel and traditional distribution. Surveyed 10+ distributor warehouses across Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei; authored warehouse management guidelines based on layout and sales correlation.

Supported full lifecycle development of a channel CRM system for commercialized advertising, from requirements gathering to launch. Managed channel lead program operations, tracking lead distribution and agent follow-up execution.

awards.title: Comprehensive Development First-Class Scholarship (3 times, Top 2%)
National Second Prize in National Supply Chain Competition
Provincial Second Prize in Statistical Modeling Competition
Provincial Second Prize in Logistics Designing Competition
